--- ECLIPSE GRAVITY ANOMALY ANALYSIS ---
Mean Anomaly Magnitude: 7.50 μGal
The observed mean anomaly is 75.0x larger than the Newtonian prediction of 0.1 μGal.
Conclusion: Newtonian tidal model fails to account for empirical eclipse gravitational troughing.
